items.title_en: Fed to hike? When traders see a rate increase coming
items.title_zh: 美联储加息？当交易者看到加息即将到来时
items.desc_en: Traders on prediction market platforms see increasing odds that an interest rate hike from the central bank comes by July 2027.
items.desc_zh: 预测市场平台上的交易员认为，央行在 2027 年 7 月之前加息的可能性越来越大。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: We talk to an expert about the risks from AI hackers.
items.desc_zh: 我们与专家讨论了人工智能黑客带来的风险。

items.title_en: Vance defends stock-trading spree in Trump financial filings: 'Come on, man'
items.title_zh: 万斯在特朗普财务文件中为股票交易热潮辩护：“来吧，伙计”
items.desc_en: Vice President JD Vance said at the White House on Tuesday that he and President Donald Trump both support banning congressional stock trading.
items.desc_zh: 副总统万斯周二在白宫表示，他和总统唐纳德·特朗普都支持禁止国会股票交易。

items.title_en: What's the mortgage rate you'll be paying later this year? Probably higher
items.title_zh: 今年晚些时候您将支付的抵押贷款利率是多少？可能更高
items.desc_en: With mortgage rates reaching a record high on Tuesday, traders also increase likelihood that rates will go above 6.8%.
items.desc_zh: 随着周二抵押贷款利率创下历史新高，交易员也增加了利率升至 6.8% 以上的可能性。

items.title_en: Trump's past tax returns get protection from IRS enforcement under 'lawfare' fund settlement
items.title_zh: 特朗普过去的纳税申报表在“法律”基金结算下受到国税局执法的保护
items.desc_en: President Trump agreed to drop his lawsuit against the IRS in exchange for a fund that can compensate allies who were targeted under the Biden administration.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普总统同意放弃对国税局的诉讼，以换取一笔可以补偿拜登政府针对的盟友的基金。

items.title_en: Stocks are poised to handle a small hike in rates, according to the charts
items.title_zh: 根据图表，股市已做好应对利率小幅上涨的准备
items.desc_en: There's a lot of time between now and a possible first rate hike, and a lot of room for market volatility as investors weigh this new reality.
items.desc_zh: 从现在到可能的首次加息还有很长的时间，当投资者权衡这一新现实时，市场波动的空间很大。

items.title_zh: 抵押贷款利率飙升至7月以来最高水平
items.desc_en: Mortgage rates continued to move higher Tuesday on uncertainty over the war with Iran. They are at the highest level since last July.
items.desc_zh: 由于与伊朗战争的不确定性，周二抵押贷款利率继续走高。它们处于去年七月以来的最高水平。

items.title_zh: 马尔代夫洞穴内发现两具失踪意大利人尸体

items.desc_zh: 中部非洲疑似有数百起病例，但专家担心实际数字可能要高得多。

items.title_en: The AI economy is rewriting the American Dream — and blue-collar workers are poised to win
items.title_zh: 人工智能经济正在改写美国梦——蓝领工人将赢得胜利
items.desc_en: AI-driven hiring slowdowns are hitting some entry-level jobs for college graduates as companies like Ford and AT&T ramp up recruiting for skilled trade workers.
items.desc_zh: 随着福特和 AT&T 等公司加大对熟练贸易工人的招聘力度，人工智能驱动的招聘放缓正在打击大学毕业生的一些入门级工作。

items.title_zh: 西班牙枪击事件造成两人死亡，据报道婴儿受伤
items.desc_en: Police say a 25-year-old man is suspected of killing his parents and injuring four others in southern Spain.
items.desc_zh: 警方称，一名 25 岁男子涉嫌在西班牙南部杀害了他的父母并打伤了另外四人。

items.title_en: Starbucks Korea sacks CEO over controversial 'Tank Day' promotion
items.title_zh: 韩国星巴克因“坦克日”促销引发争议而解雇首席执行官
items.desc_en: Starbucks withdrew the campaign for its drink tumblers after many said it referenced a bloody crackdown.
items.desc_zh: 在许多人表示星巴克涉及血腥镇压后，星巴克撤回了其饮料杯的宣传活动。

items.title_en: Tasmanian government apologises over stolen body parts scandal
items.title_zh: 塔斯马尼亚政府就被盗尸体丑闻道歉
items.desc_en: An investigation found that 177 human specimens from dozens of bodies were secretly kept by a museum.
items.desc_zh: 调查发现，某博物馆秘密保存了数十具尸体的177具人体标本。

items.title_en: VWFNDR™ + MBL
items.title_zh: VWFNDR™ + MBL
items.desc_en: Take raw photos with proof they're real, not AI
items.desc_zh: 拍摄原始照片并证明它们是真实的，而不是人工智能的

items.title_en: Robo-top: The machines that could make your next t-shirt
items.title_zh: Robo-top：可以为你制作下一件 T 恤的机器
items.desc_en: Most clothes are made in Asia, but new machines could bring some of that work back to the West.
items.desc_zh: 大多数衣服都是在亚洲制造的，但新机器可以将部分工作带回西方。

items.title_en: Satellites and AI used to track UK hedgehogs in bid to slow decline
items.title_zh: 卫星和人工智能用于追踪英国刺猬以减缓其数量下降
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the project will also help to identify barriers preventing hedgehogs from finding food and mates in the wild.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望该项目还能帮助找出刺猬在野外寻找食物和交配的障碍。

items.title_en: Thinnest AI
items.title_zh: Thinnest AI
items.desc_en: Build Voice AI Agents in 100+ languages for ₹1.5/min
items.desc_zh: 以 100 多种语言构建语音 AI 代理，每分钟 1.5 卢比

items.title_en: Selling children to survive: Afghan fathers forced to make impossible choices
items.title_zh: 卖儿求生：阿富汗父亲被迫做出不可能的选择
items.desc_en: In Afghanistan today, a staggering three in four people cannot meet their basic needs.
items.desc_zh: 如今，在阿富汗，有四分之三的人无法满足他们的基本需求。

items.title_en: Agora-1 by Odyssey
items.title_zh: Agora-1 by Odyssey
items.desc_en: A multi-agent world model you can play
items.desc_zh: 您可以玩的多代理世界模型

items.title_en: Trump says he called off new Iran attack at request of Gulf states
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，他应海湾国家的要求取消了新的伊朗袭击
items.desc_en: The US president says he is holding off on a US attack planned for Tuesday as "serious negotiations are now taking place".
items.desc_zh: 美国总统表示，他将推迟美国计划于周二发动的袭击，因为“目前正在进行认真的谈判”。

items.title_en: Trainer
items.title_zh: Trainer
items.desc_en: Train AI agents by recording your screen
items.desc_zh: 通过录制屏幕来训练人工智能代理

items.title_en: Elon Musk just lost another lawsuit. Will he keep fighting?
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克刚刚又输掉了另一场官司。他会继续战斗吗？
items.desc_en: Musk's loss against OpenAI is the latest in a string of courtroom defeats.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克输给 OpenAI 是一系列法庭失败中的最新一起。

items.title_en: Jury tosses Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and its boss Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 陪审团驳回埃隆·马斯克对 OpenAI 及其老板萨姆·奥尔特曼的诉讼
items.desc_en: Jurors spent nearly a month hearing and viewing evidence in the high-profile trial, where Musk had accused Altman of "stealing a charity".
items.desc_zh: 陪审员们花了近一个月的时间在这场备受瞩目的审判中听取和查看证据，马斯克在审判中指控奥特曼“窃取慈善机构”。

items.title_en: Starchild-1 by Odyssey
items.title_zh: Starchild-1 by Odyssey
items.desc_en: The first real-time multimodal world model
items.desc_zh: 第一个实时多式联运世界模型

items.title_en: Instant AI answers can trivialise human intelligence, warns Royal Observatory
items.title_zh: 皇家天文台警告说，即时人工智能答案可能会削弱人类智能
items.desc_en: Paddy Rodgers said the Observatory's rich history showed the power of human knowledge and the need to avoid "dependence" on AI.
items.desc_zh: 帕迪·罗杰斯表示，天文台丰富的历史表明了人类知识的力量以及避免“依赖”人工智能的必要性。

items.title_zh: AutoShelf
items.desc_en: Auto-organize files on your Mac
items.desc_zh: 自动整理 Mac 上的文件

items.title_zh: Haystack
items.desc_en: Review the pull requests that actually need human attention
items.desc_zh: 审查实际需要人工关注的拉取请求

items.title_en: LearnHouse
items.title_zh: LearnHouse
items.desc_en: The modern way to teach what you build
items.desc_zh: 以现代方式教授您的构建内容

items.title_zh: Chert
items.desc_en: Build AI agents that text customers in iMessage
items.desc_zh: 构建在 iMessage 中向客户发送短信的 AI 代理

items.title_zh: CtrlOps
items.desc_en: Deploy, Debug & Manage Linux Servers with AI.
items.desc_zh: 使用 AI 部署、调试和管理 Linux 服务器。

items.title_en: Vocabi
items.title_zh: Vocabi
items.desc_en: Translate, save & memorize words while you read
items.desc_zh: 阅读时翻译、保存和记忆单词

items.title_en: Lyricly
items.title_zh: Lyricly
items.desc_en: Live lyrics in your dynamic Notch & floating on your desktop
items.desc_zh: 动态 Notch 中的实时歌词并浮动在桌面上

items.title_en: X pledges quicker action on hate and terror content in the UK
items.title_zh: X 承诺对英国的仇恨和恐怖内容采取更快的行动
items.desc_en: Ofcom said the commitments were of particular importance after recent crimes targeting Jewish communities in the UK.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，在英国最近发生针对犹太社区的犯罪事件后，这些承诺尤为重要。

items.title_en: Claim, counter-claim and tech's seedy side exposed: Five things we learned in the Musk-Altman trial
items.title_zh: 索赔、反索赔和科技的肮脏一面暴露：我们在马斯克-奥特曼审判中学到的五件事
items.desc_en: As the jury deliberates, this is what we found out during the weeks-long trial with two tech titans at its heart.
items.desc_zh: 正如陪审团审议的那样，这是我们在以两位科技巨头为核心的长达数周的审判中发现的结果。

items.title_en: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
items.title_zh: 走进兰花育种的秘密和利润丰厚的世界
items.desc_en: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.
items.desc_zh: 将新兰花推向市场可能需要十年的时间，因此育种者对其高科技流程保密。

items.title_en: AI could put people off tech jobs and hurt the economy, warns Raspberry Pi boss
items.title_zh: Raspberry Pi 老板警告说，人工智能可能会让人们失业并损害经济
items.desc_en: Eben Upton warns against claims that Artificial Intelligence will destroy vast numbers of computing roles over the coming years.
items.desc_zh: 埃本·厄普顿 (Eben Upton) 对人工智能将在未来几年摧毁大量计算角色的说法提出警告。

items.title_en: Buggyverse
items.title_zh: Buggyverse
items.desc_en: Study with strangers online, high-accountability focus rooms
items.desc_zh: 与陌生人在线学习，高度负责的焦点室

items.title_en: 'Millions' of pounds saved by replacing Palantir tech in refugee system
items.title_zh: 通过在难民系统中更换 Palantir 技术节省了“数百万英镑”
items.desc_en: The government said its in-house IT system was "more flexible" while meeting "high standards" of security.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，其内部IT系统“更加灵活”，同时满足“高标准”的安全性。

items.title_en: HMRC to use AI from British tech firm to spot fraud and tax return errors
items.title_zh: 英国税务海关总署将使用英国科技公司的人工智能来发现欺诈和纳税申报错误
items.desc_en: Quantexa, a financial data platform, won the £175m contract to spot fraud and tax return errors.
items.desc_zh: 金融数据平台 Quantexa 赢得了价值 1.75 亿英镑的合同，以发现欺诈和纳税申报错误。

items.title_en: Voker
items.title_zh: Voker
items.desc_en: The Agent Analytics Platform for AI Product Teams
items.desc_zh: 人工智能产品团队的代理分析平台

items.title_en: Thousands of Waymo robotaxis recalled over risk of entering flooded roads
items.title_zh: 数千辆 Waymo 机器人出租车因存在进入被洪水淹没的道路的风险而被召回
items.desc_en: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.
items.desc_zh: 此次自愿召回是在 4 月 20 日发生的一起事件之后发生的，当时一辆空的 Waymo 汽车进入德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥市一条被洪水淹没的道路。

items.desc_zh: 摇摇欲坠的道路和其他危险——人工智能能让我们的街道更安全吗？
